title: The State of the Studio
excerpt: Walking in the door, panning from left to right, I took some pictures of the current state of the studio. I've been working a lot on projects for clients, my class for BPC - Here & There Inspiration , and…
body:
Walking in the door, panning from left to right, I took some pictures of the current state of the studio. I've been working a lot on projects for clients, my class for BPC - Here & There Inspiration, and some other things that have kept me super busy. Full disclosure: I didn't tidy up a single bit before snapping these. Obviously.

Rather embarrassing, but as you can see, it's complete chaos over here. It ain't pretty, but somehow (miraculously) it's working to some degree.
